calendar.matters:
Petition For Acceptance Of The Resignation Of Trustee And For Modification Of Trust And For Transfer Of Place Of Administration & Appt Of Succ Trustee
Off Calendar Oct-08-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Drummond F. McCunn appeared by Court Call for Lynne K. Carr.

Mr. McCunn confirmed that there was no other administration in any other Court. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the written order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda.
